module.name: native
module.purpose: Folder-organized native Tool implementations exposing NAME/DESCRIPTION/SCHEMA consts, Platform support markers, ToolRuntime-owned status/cancel channels, direct ToolExecutionStatus completion/cancellation/failure handling, and native tool list functions.

childModules.name: file
childModules.purpose: File-system native Tool implementations for reading, writing, listing, and searching local files while reporting ToolExecutionStatus values through ToolRuntime-owned status channels and checking cancellation around file-system work.

childModules.name: image
childModules.purpose: Image native Tool implementations for inspecting metadata and transforming images while reporting ToolExecutionStatus values through ToolRuntime-owned status channels and checking cancellation around expensive work.

childModules.name: network
childModules.purpose: Network native Tool implementations for HTTP requests and DNS lookups while reporting ToolExecutionStatus values through ToolRuntime-owned status channels with cancellation checks.

childModules.name: package
childModules.purpose: Windows package query native Tool implementation that runs PowerShell Get-Package, checks cancellation during child-process polling, and reports ToolExecutionStatus output through ToolRuntime-owned status channels.

childModules.name: shell
childModules.purpose: Shell native Tool implementation that parses command/cwd/timeout, runs cmd or sh, streams stdout/stderr, enforces timeout, and maps completion/cancellation/failure into ToolExecutionStatus through ToolRuntime-owned status channels.

childModules.name: system
childModules.purpose: System native Tool implementations for environment, process, and system information that report ToolExecutionStatus values through ToolRuntime-owned status channels and check cancellation where work can be interrupted.
